WASM Explorer - Third-Party Notices
===================================

This tool bundles WABT, the WebAssembly Binary Toolkit.

Vendored artifact
-----------------
Package : wabt@1.0.39 (npm)
File    : vendor/wabt.js
Source  : https://github.com/WebAssembly/wabt
License : Apache-2.0 (see LICENSE-wabt.txt)

libwabt.wasm is embedded inline in vendor/wabt.js, so there is no separate
.wasm fetch at runtime. The Binaryen build was intentionally excluded from
this release to keep the deploy bundle under the size cap.
